info.name: Invoice Management System API v2.0
info.description:
Enterprise-grade API collection for testing the Invoice Management System. Includes comprehensive security, monitoring, and business functionality tests.

## Features Tested
- **Phase 1**: Core business functionality (invoices, customers, products)
- **Phase 2**: Security (XSS/SQL injection protection, rate limiting)
- **Phase 2**: Monitoring (health checks, metrics, performance)
- **Phase 2**: Error handling (standardized responses, validation)

## Environment Setup
Create environment with:
- `base_url`: http://localhost:8000
- `test_customer_id`: 1
- `test_product_id`: 1
- `security_test_enabled`: true
- `monitoring_enabled`: true

## Security Testing
- XSS protection validation
- SQL injection detection
- Input validation testing
- Security headers verification
- Rate limiting validation

## Performance Testing
- N+1 query optimization validation
- Response time monitoring
- Database performance metrics
- System resource monitoring

item.name: Invoice Endpoints
item.description: All invoice-related operations - tested and validated

request.description: Creates a new invoice with line items. Tests the fix for LineItem creation data consistency.

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "id": 882,
  "customer_name": "Rodriguez, Figueroa and Sanchez Manufacturing Co",
  "customer_address": "819 Johnson Course, East William, AK 74064",
  "customer_phone": "0433218196",
  "date_issued": "2025-01-15",
  "invoice_due_date": "2025-02-14",
  "invoice_terms": "Net 30",
  "invoice_total": 150.0,
  "invoice_status": "submitted",
  "line_items": [{
    "product_id": 1,
    "lineitem_qty": 2,
    "lineitem_total": 150.0,
    "product_description": "Wireless Bluetooth Headphones",
    "product_price": 141.02
  }]
}

exec: pm.test('Line items have product relationships', function () {

request.description: Retrieves a specific invoice by ID. Tests the null check fix to ensure proper responses.
Tests error handling for non-existent invoice. Should return 404, not crash with 500.
Updates an existing invoice. Tests the major field mapping fix for the PUT endpoint.
Retrieves all invoices. Note: This endpoint may have N+1 query issues with large datasets.
Deletes an invoice by ID. Use with caution as this is permanent.
Creates a new customer
Retrieves all customers
Retrieves a specific customer by ID
Creates a new product
Retrieves all products

item.name: Testing & Validation
item.description: Special test requests for validation and debugging

request.description: Tests CORS preflight configuration to ensure security settings are correct
Validates that due date calculation is consistent between frontend and backend. Net 30 from 2025-01-15 should equal 2025-02-14.

item.name: Security & Validation Tests
item.description: Phase 2 security testing - validates XSS protection, SQL injection detection, and input validation

request.description: Tests XSS protection by attempting to inject script tags. Should be blocked with 400 status.
Tests SQL injection protection by attempting to inject DROP TABLE statement. Should be blocked with 400 status.
Tests JSON validation by sending malformed JSON. Should be caught by input validation middleware.

response.name: Invalid JSON Response

request.description: Tests that all required security headers are present in responses. Validates Phase 2 security middleware.

item.name: System Health & Monitoring
item.description: Phase 2 monitoring endpoints - health checks, metrics, and performance monitoring

request.description: Basic health check for load balancers and monitoring systems. Fast response with service info.
Comprehensive health check including database connectivity, system resources, and application status.
Focused database health check with connection and performance metrics.
Comprehensive system metrics including business KPIs and performance data for monitoring systems.
Application status and feature discovery endpoint for service registries.
